sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50555" key="i)cobole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰξο-βολέω</orth>, <sense id="n50555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">practise bird-liming</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐκ ἰδίην -βολῶν μελέτην</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.273</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Bian.).</sense> </entryFree>
